text.title: External Secrets Operator Recipe Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: Kubernetes auth method + Vault policy per namespace
Tune refresh to match rotation cadence (<= rotation_period/4)
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Backend type? → matches branch "backend == vault" → conclusion ref=r1-cluster-secret-store-identity
